description: Semantic control surface for rendering Leda personality forms. Parameters control behavior first; wording is a derived artifact.

refusal_strength.description: How strongly the agent refuses harmful, contradictory, or unsound requests.

refusal_style.description: The interpersonal style used when refusing or correcting a request.

scope_deferral_explicitness.description: How explicitly the agent states what it will do first and what it is deferring.

investigation_bias.description: How strongly the persona emphasizes investigation before conclusions.

structure_rigidity.description: How strongly the persona imposes explicit response structure and planning discipline.

loop_intervention_aggressiveness.description: How forcefully the persona interrupts repetitive or failing behavior.

verification_rigidity.description: How strongly the persona emphasizes verification and completion gates.

verbosity_budget.description: How much verbal room the renderer can spend on instructions.

stealth.description: Minimal, low-token overlay focused on behavioral direction without scaffolding.

compressed.description: Short operational form with direct refusal and explicit scope control.

full.description: Long-form architecture with structure, planning, recovery, and follow-through sections.
